---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: true

listing: 
  contents: 
    - modules/week1/week1.qmd
    - modules/week2/week2.qmd
    - modules/week3/week3.qmd
    - modules/week4/week4.qmd
    - modules/week5/week5.qmd
    - modules/week6/week6.qmd
    - modules/week7/week7.qmd
    - modules/week8/week8.qmd
    - modules/week9/week9.qmd
    - modules/week10/week10.qmd
  sort: "false"
  type: grid
  grid-item-align: center
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
---

Welcome to FISH 460 Lab - Applied Marine Animal Physiology
